query_title: Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin Part I: Origins
recommendations.overview: In 1868, after the Bakumatsu war ends, the ex-assassin Kenshin Himura traverses Japan with an inverted sword, to defend the needy without killing.

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin: The Final
recommendations.overview: In 1879, Kenshin and his allies face their strongest enemy yet: his former brother-in-law Enishi Yukishiro and his minions, who've vowed their revenge.

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin: The Beginning
recommendations.overview: Before he was a protector, Kenshin was a fearsome assassin known as Battosai. But when he meets gentle Tomoe Yukishiro, a beautiful young woman who carries a huge burden in her heart, his life will change forever.

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin Part II: Kyoto Inferno
recommendations.overview: Kenshin has settled into his new life with Kaoru and his other friends when he is approached with a request from the Meiji government. Makoto Shishio, a former assassin like Kenshin, was betrayed, set on fire and left for dead. He survived, and is no

recommendations.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
recommendations.overview: Young hobbit Frodo Baggins, after inheriting a mysterious ring from his uncle Bilbo, must leave his home in order to keep it from falling into the hands of its evil creator. Along the way, a fellowship is formed to protect the ringbearer and make sur

recommendations.title: Doctor Strange
recommendations.overview: After his career is destroyed, a brilliant but arrogant surgeon gets a new lease on life when a sorcerer takes him under her wing and trains him to defend the world against evil.

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.overview: An Amazon princess comes to the world of Man in the grips of the First World War to confront the forces of evil and bring an end to human conflict.

recommendations.title: One Piece: Stampede
recommendations.overview: The world's boldest buccaneers set sail for the great Pirate Festival, where the Straw Hats join a mad-dash race to find Gol D. Roger's treasure. There's just one little problem: An old member of Roger's crew has a sinister score to settle.

recommendations.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Grudge of Edinburgh Part 2
recommendations.overview: Reunited with Lancelot for the first time since their tragic accident, Tristan must learn to conquer his inner demons in order to save his mother's life.

recommendations.title: Chitty Chitty Bang Bang
recommendations.overview: A hapless inventor finally finds success with a flying car, which a dictator from a foreign government sets out to take for himself.
